{{Quote|Cloaking transport here.|A F9-TZ driver|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The '''F9-TZ Transport''' was a large [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] utilized by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].

==Characteristics==
The F9-TZ was unique in that it employed a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], allowing for clandestine insertions into a battle zone.<ref name="RECG" /> However, due to the power requirements, the F9-TZ could not use its cloaking device and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] at the same time. The cloaking device was fully integrated into the transport, preventing it from being installed on any other vehicles without a complete overhaul. At full charge, this device could operate for 15 minutes before it had to be shut down and recharged, an operation that lasted 30 minutes.<ref name="RECG" />

The F9-TZ had room to carry four [[Squad/Legends|squads]] and their gear, but could not carry any other vehicles.<ref name="RECG" /> In addition, unlike contemporaries such as the [[HAVt B5 Juggernaut]], the F9-TZ was unarmed, making it vulnerable to heavy fire.

The F9-TZ was based in part on the design of [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop's]] [[RHTT-6 transport]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
